name: Stripe
philosophy: An inspired interpretation of Stripi's design language — a financial-infrastructure brand built on a deep navy ink, an electric indigo primary, and a recurring atmospheric gradient mesh that occupies the upper third of nearly every marketing page.
trademark_signals: Gradient-mesh backdrop on every marketing hero — cream/orange/lavender/indigo/ruby horizontally washed across the upper third of the page
Single-indigo CTA hierarchy: filled pill is the only filled button on marketing surfaces
Sohne thin (weight 300) display tier with negative tracking from -1.4px to -0.2px depending on size
Tabular-figure body type (tnum) for any cell containing money or numerics — the brand's quiet financial-data signal
Dark-app dashboard track: deep navy product UI mockups sit composited above the white canvas, frequently with rendered code or dashboard tables inside
ai_slop_avoided: Don't add new accent colors outside the documented gradient stops (cream / orange / lavender / indigo / ruby / magenta)
Don't use the indigo as a body-text color
